name: The Traveler and the Burning Abyss
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>旅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>びと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>到</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>彼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>岸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: The Traveler Arrives at the Afterlife
desc: Target any number of "Burning Abyss" monsters in your Graveyard that were sent there this turn; Special Summon them in Defense Position. You can only activate 1 "The Traveler and the Burning Abyss" per turn.
eff: Target any number of "Burning Abyss" monsters in your Graveyard that were sent there this turn; Special Summon them in Defense Position. You can only activate 1 "The Traveler and the Burning Abyss" per turn.
